projects.name: Reorganize Gym/Storage Room
projects.desc: Clear out and reorganize the gym/storage area - sports equipment, weights, off-season clothes, and family items
projects.notes: Goal: Create functional zones for gym equipment, sports gear, and seasonal storage

subtasks.name: Clear out & inventory everything
subtasks.notes: Take everything out, make a list of what we have

subtasks.name: Sort into categories
subtasks.notes: Categories: weights, sports equipment, off-season clothes, occasional items, trash/donate

subtasks.name: Declutter - donate/sell/trash
subtasks.notes: Be ruthless! If not used in 2 years, let it go

subtasks.name: Plan new layout
subtasks.notes: Sketch zones: workout area, sports gear wall, clothes storage, misc shelving

subtasks.name: Buy storage solutions
subtasks.notes: Wall hooks, clear bins, shelving unit, clothing vacuum bags

subtasks.name: Set up gym/weights zone
subtasks.notes: Weight rack, floor mat, mirror if space allows

subtasks.name: Organize sports equipment
subtasks.notes: Golf clubs, skis, balls, rackets - use wall hooks and bins

subtasks.name: Store off-season clothes
subtasks.notes: Vacuum bags for winter/summer clothes, label by family member

subtasks.name: Label everything
subtasks.notes: Clear labels on all bins and shelves

subtasks.name: Final cleanup & family walkthrough
subtasks.notes: Sweep, mop, show everyone where things go!
